title: Studies in Carbohydrates. Part X. Hydrolysis Products of the  Gum from Drum Stick Plant (Moringa Pterygosperma)
author: T. R. Ingle
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: From the hydrolyastes of the gum from Drum Stick plant ( \(Moringa\)    \(pterygosperma\) ),  obtained under mild acidic conditions, an aldotriouronic said and a partially hydrolysed gum; designated as  ' a degraded gem', have been isolated. The structural features of these products are discussed on the basis of their methyation studies.
steps_raw: From the hydrolyastes of the gum from Drum Stick plant ( \(Moringa\)    \(pterygosperma\) ),  obtained under mild acidic conditions, an aldotriouronic said and a partially hydrolysed gum; designated as  ' a degraded gem', have been isolated. The structural features of these products are discussed on the basis of their methyation studies.
